description: Make context-budget progressive-disclosure-aware: report a real `live startup` token estimate (skills/agents counted at frontmatter description size, since Claude Code loads only name+description until invoked; rules/CLAUDE.md/MCP at full) alongside the on-disk surface, and rank reclaims by live tokens. Fixes the tool over-counting lazy-loaded skill/agent bodies as if loaded at startup.

completions.notes: Progressive-disclosure-aware: surface vs live tokens per component (skills/agents=name+description only; rules/CLAUDE.md/mcp=full, mcp flagged may-defer). Reclaims ranked by live. Forge: 70.5K surface reclaimable = ~5.0K live. 27 tests; Codex 2 rounds CLEAN; full suite green (3530/146/100).
